lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਗੁਣ ਸਹਜਿ ਬਿਚਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: gur arajun gun sehaj bichaaran |
lines.english: With intuitive peace and poise, I contemplate the Glorious Virtues of Guru Arjun.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪੂਰੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath pooree aasaa |
lines.english: and all hopes and desires were fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਘਰਿ ਕੀਅਉ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas ghar keeo pragaasaa |
lines.english: He was revealed in the House of Guru Raam Daas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਜੋਗ ਕੌ ਜੈਤਵਾਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਨਕੁ ਉਪਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat jog kau jaitavaar har janak upaayau |
lines.english: The Lord brought Him into the world, to practice the Yoga of devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈ ਜਨਮਤ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: tai janamat guramat braham pachhaanio |
lines.english: From birth, He realized God through the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲੵ ਜੋੜਿ ਕਰ ਸੁਜਸੁ ਵਖਾਣਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: kalay jorr kar sujas vakhaanio |
lines.english: With palms pressed together, KALL the poet speaks His praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਗਦ ਅਮਰ ਲਾਗਿ ਉਤਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur naanak angad amar laag utam pad paayau |
lines.english: Attached to Guru Nanak, Guru Angad and Guru Amar Daas, He attained the supreme status.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਪਰਕਾਸਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨ ਬਸਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabad guroo parakaasio har rasan basaayau |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad has been revealed, and the Lord dwells on His tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਡਭਾਗੀ ਉਨਮਾਨਿਅਉ ਰਿਦਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਬਸਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: baddabhaagee unamaaniaau rid sabad basaayau |
lines.english: By great good fortune, the mind is uplifted and exalted, and the Word of the Shabad dwells in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਘਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਭਗਤ ਉਤਰਿ ਆਯਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur arajun ghar gur raamadaas bhagat utar aayau |1|
lines.english: In the House of Guru Raam Daas, the devotee of the Lord, Guru Arjun was born. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮਾਣਕੁ ਸੰਤੋਖਿਅਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੑਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: man maanak santokhiaau gur naam drirraayau |
lines.english: The jewel of the mind is contented; the Guru has implanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦਰਸਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar paarabraham satigur darasaayau |
lines.english: The Inaccessible and Unfathomable, Supreme Lord God is revealed through the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਘਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਅਨਭਉ ਠਹਰਾਯਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur arajun ghar gur raamadaas anbhau tthaharaayau |2|
lines.english: In the House of Guru Raam Daas, Guru Arjun has appeared as the Embodiment of the Fearless Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਕ ਰਾਜੁ ਬਰਤਾਇਆ ਸਤਜੁਗੁ ਆਲੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: janak raaj barataaeaa satajug aaleenaa |
lines.english: The benign rule of Raja Janak has been established, and the Golden Age of Sat Yuga has begun.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਅਪਤੀਜੁ ਪਤੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabade man maaniaa apateej pateenaa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the mind is pleased and appeased; the unsatisfied mind is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਚੁ ਨੀਵ ਸਾਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਲੀਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur naanak sach neev saaj satigur sang leenaa |
lines.english: Guru Nanak laid the foundation of Truth; He is blended with the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਲੁ ਗੂੜੑਉ ਕੀਅਉ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ਸੰਤੋਖਿ ਸਮਾਚਰੵਿਓ ਬਿਮਲ ਬੁਧਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਮਾਣਉ ॥
lines.translit: khel goorrau keeo har raae santokh samaacharayio bimal budh satigur samaanau |
lines.english: The Sovereign Lord King has staged this wondrous play; contentment was gathered together, and pure understanding was infused in the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਘਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਬੀਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur arajun ghar gur raamadaas aparanpar beenaa |3|
lines.english: In the House of Guru Raam Daas, Guru Arjun has appeared as the Embodiment of the Infinite Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਜੋਨੀ ਸੰਭਵਿਅਉ ਸੁਜਸੁ ਕਲੵ ਕਵੀਅਣਿ ਬਖਾਣਿਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: aajonee sanbhaviaau sujas kalay kaveean bakhaaniaau |
lines.english: KALL the poet utters the Praises of the Unborn, Self-existent Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਵਰੵਉ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਪਰਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas arajun varyau paaras paras pramaan |4|
lines.english: Guru Raam Daas blessed Guru Arjun, who touched the Philosopher's Stone, and was certified. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਵਰੵਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਅੰਗਦਿ ਅਮਰ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur naanak angad varyau gur angad amar nidhaan |
lines.english: Guru Nanak blessed Guru Angad, and Guru Angad blessed Guru Amar Daas with the treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਆਜੋਨੀ ਸੰਭਉ ॥
lines.translit: sad jeevan arajun amol aajonee sanbhau |
lines.english: O Guru Arjun, You are Eternal, Invaluable, Unborn, Self-existent,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਯ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਪਰ ਦੁਖ ਨਿਵਾਰੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਅਨੰਭਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhay bhanjan par dukh nivaar apaar ananbhau |
lines.english: the Destroyer of fear, the Dispeller of pain, Infinite and Fearless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸੰਭਉ ਉਦਵਿਅਉ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਬਿਧਾਤਉ ॥
lines.translit: aasanbhau udaviaau purakh pooran bidhaatau |
lines.english: The Self-existent, Perfect Primal Lord God Creator has taken birth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਹ ਗਹਣੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭ੍ਰਾਂਤਿ ਦਹਣੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਸੁਖ ਦਾਤਉ ॥
lines.translit: agah gehan bhram bhraant dehan seetal sukh daatau |
lines.english: You have grasped the Ungraspable, and burnt away doubt and skepticism. You bestow cooling and soothing peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਦਿ ਅੰਗਦ ਅਮਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: naanak aad angad amar satigur sabad samaaeaau |
lines.english: First, Guru Nanak, then Guru Angad and Guru Amar Daas, the True Guru, have been absorbed into the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਪਰਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan guroo raamadaas gur jin paaras paras milaaeaau |5|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is Guru Raam Daas, the Philosopher's Stone, who transformed Guru Arjun unto Himself. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਾਰੁ ਜਾਸੁ ਜਗ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮੰਦਰਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਸਿਵ ਰਹਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jai jai kaar jaas jag andar mandar bhaag jugat siv rahataa |
lines.english: His victory is proclaimed all over the world; His Home is blessed with good fortune; He remains united with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਯ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਪਰ ਪੀਰ ਨਿਵਾਰਨੁ ਕਲੵ ਸਹਾਰੁ ਤੋਹਿ ਜਸੁ ਬਕਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhay bhanjan par peer nivaaran kalay sahaar tohi jas bakataa |
lines.english: He is the Destroyer of fear, the Eradicator of the pains of others. Kall Sahaar the poet utters Your Praise, O Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਯਉ ਬਡ ਭਾਗੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਮੇਦਨਿ ਭਰੁ ਸਹਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa paayau badd bhaagee liv laagee medan bhar sahataa |
lines.english: By great good fortune, He has found the Perfect Guru; He remains lovingly attuned to Him, and endures the load of the earth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਲਿ ਸੋਢੀ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਤਨੁ ਧਰਮ ਧੁਜਾ ਅਰਜੁਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kul sodtee gur raamadaas tan dharam dhujaa arajun har bhagataa |6|
lines.english: In the Sodhi family, is born Arjun, the son of Guru Raam Daas, the holder of the banner of Dharma and the devotee of God. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰੰਮ ਧੀਰੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਗਭੀਰੁ ਪਰ ਦੁਖ ਬਿਸਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhram dheer guramat gabheer par dukh bisaaran |
lines.english: The Support of the Dharma, immersed in the deep and profound Teachings of the Guru, the Remover of the pains of others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦ ਸਾਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਮ ਉਦਾਰੁ ਅਹੰਮੇਵ ਨਿਵਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabad saar har sam udaar ahamev nivaaran |
lines.english: The Shabad is excellent and sublime, kind and generous like the Lord, the Destroyer of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਦਾਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਨ ਹੁਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa daan satigur giaan man chaau na huttai |
lines.english: The Great Giver, the spiritual wisdom of the True Guru, His mind does not grow weary of its yearning for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਵੰਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਨ ਨਿਖੁਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: sativant har naam mantru nav nidh na nikhuttai |
lines.english: The Embodiment of Truth, the Mantra of the Lord's Name, the nine treasures are never exhausted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਤਨੁ ਸਰਬ ਮੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਚੰਦੋਆ ਤਾਣਿਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas tan sarab mai sehaj chandoaa taaniaau |
lines.english: O Son of Guru Raam Daas, You are contained amidst all; the canopy of intuitive wisdom is spread above You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਰਜੁਨ ਕਲੵੁਚਰੈ ਤੈ ਰਾਜ ਜੋਗ ਰਸੁ ਜਾਣਿਅਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur arajun kalayucharai tai raaj jog ras jaaniaau |7|
lines.english: So speaks KALL the poet: O Guru Arjun, You know the sublime essence of Raja Yoga, the Yoga of meditation and success. ||7||
